notes.anchor: in the power of our friends
notes.note: In amicorum nostrorum potestate: euphemism for the dominance of the renewed triumvirate after the conference at Luca in April 56 BC. By January 55 Pompey and Crassus were consuls again.

Nostra studia litterarum: the literary and philosophical reading and writing into which Cicero retreats when politics becomes impossible. The retreat that began here would in 55 BC produce De Oratore.

notes.anchor: an order most closely bound to it
notes.note: The equestrian order, alienated from the Senate by the political struggles of the late 60s and 50s --- a recurring lament in the post-exile letters.
